title: CHILD WELFARE ADVOCACY - 211info
text: SELF ENHANCEMENT INC COMMUNITY & FAMILY PROGRAMS CHILD WELFARE ADVOCACY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides supportive services to stabilize families, keep children out of foster care, and work toward reunification. Services parenting classes, support groups, case management, advocacy with Child Welfare System, and resource navigation. 310 NE Failing Street Portland, OR 97212 Eligibility: Must be referred by DHS Child Welfare Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Email (503) 285-0493 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 285-0493 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Multnomah County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Services: Court Ordered Parenting Programs Family Preservation Programs Home Based Parenting Education Intensive Family Reunification Services Parent Support Groups Parent/Child Activity Groups Parenting Skills Classes Other Services Offered At This Location: HOUSING/SHELTER - SHORT TERM RENTAL ASSISTANCE MUTUAL SUPPORT - ANTI DOMESTIC AND SEXUAL VIOLENCE PROGRAM UTILITIES - CITY OF PORTLAND WATER DISCOUNT PROGRAM UTILITIES - ENERGY ASSISTANCE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
